CVE-2018-10932.title: lldptool version 1.0.1 and older can print a raw, unsanitized att ...
CVE-2018-10932.description: lldptool version 1.0.1 and older can print a raw, unsanitized attacker controlled buffer when mngAddr information is displayed. This may allow an attacker to inject shell control characters into the buffer and impact the behavior of the terminal.
